query:
SELECT id, title, startTime, durationMin, sortOrder, blockType, description
FROM scheduleBlocks
WHERE planId = 1560002
ORDER BY sortOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT id, title, startTime, durationMin, sortOrder, blockType, description
FROM scheduleBlocks
WHERE planId = 1560002
ORDER BY sortOrder;

rows.title: Vet Appointment
rows.description: API vet appointment — noon to 12:45 PM.

rows.title: Sophie's Fun Learning Session
rows.description: Sophie arrives at 1 PM with Reagan and her friend for fun educational activities that Sophie prepares. Group session — hands-on, activity-based learning.
